name: Kalbsschnitzel Mit Joghurt (Veal Steaks with Yogurt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the veal steaks with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Cook the veal slices about 2 minutes on each side.
4. Transfer the veal to an ovenproof casserole dish.
5. Add the sliced apples.
6. Mix evaporated milk and yogurt together in a small bowl.
7. Spread the mixture evenly over the apples.
8. Place the dish in a preheated 325°F (165°C) oven.
9. Cook until bubbly, about 20 to 30 minutes.
